title: The Narmer Palette: The Unification of Egypt
description: Possibly the oldest historical document in the world — King Narmer unites Upper and Lower Egypt.
introduction: Possibly the oldest historical document in the world — King Narmer unites Upper and Lower Egypt.

translation.text: On one side the king wears the White Crown and smites an enemy. The falcon Horus holds a captive. On the reverse, he wears the Red Crown among decapitated enemies.
